results.rendered_html:
stanaṃdhaya a. [stanaṃ dhayati dhe-khaś mum ca] Sucking the breast; yadi budhyate hariśiśuḥ stanaṃdhayo bhavitā kareṇupariśeṣitā mahī  Bv. 1. 53 ; tavāṃkaśāyī parivṛttabhāgyayā mayā na ṭṭaṣṭastanayaḥ stanaṃdhayaḥ  Māl. 10. 6. 
— yaḥ An infant, a suckling;  R. 14. 78 ,  Śi. 12. 40.
